features.name: packed struct with localparam-sized logic field and self-reference
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing a logic array sized by a localparam, used in a self-referential assignment that creates a loop within a vector

features.name: packed struct with constant-sized logic field and self-reference
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing a logic array with explicit constant size, used in a self-referential assignment that creates a loop within a vector
